prompt: Minimalist app icon 1024x1024. Pure black background. White only. A single sound wave line that transforms into the silhouette trail of a body moving — the left side of the icon shows a clean audio waveform, and as it flows to the right it organically morphs into a flowing movement trail, like a dancer's path through space. The transition is seamless and elegant. This represents music becoming movement. Thin, delicate linework. Massive negative space. No text. No letters. Centered vertically. Premium creative tool aesthetic.
